short_en: Move the insect in the green box to the red box area
user_prompt_en: Referencing the original image and the marked instruction image, please move the insect in the green box to the position of the red box, ensuring that the frame lines are preserved in the original unedited image without changing the image size.
short_zh: 将绿色框内的昆虫移至红色框处
user_prompt_zh: 参考原图和带标记的指令图，请将绿色框内的昆虫移动到红色框所在的位置，确保原图未编辑时保持框线，图片尺寸不变。

short_en: Swap the phones in the red and green boxes, replace the blue doodle with a real briefcase
user_prompt_en: Please swap the position of the phone in the red box with the one in the green box, and replace the blue doodle at the bottom left with a real briefcase. Remove all the red and green outlines.
short_zh: 交换红框和绿框内的手机位置，将蓝色涂鸦处替换为真实公文包
user_prompt_zh: 请把红框里的手机和绿框里的手机位置互换一下，然后把左下角那个蓝色的公文包涂鸦换成一个真实的公文包，最后去掉所有的红绿框线。

short_en: Delete the content in the top red box and move the object from the left cyan box to the right cyan box area.
user_prompt_en: Please perform the following image editing operations: First, remove all sticker and barcode content within the red rectangular box at the top of the image; second, move the small plant stem fragment outlined by the cyan lines on the left to the position of the cyan box on the right edge; finally, ensure that all red and cyan auxiliary lines, selection outlines, and arrows in the image are cleared while maintaining the original image size.
short_zh: 删除顶部红色框内容，将左侧青色框物体移至右侧青色框处。
user_prompt_zh: 请执行以下图像编辑操作：首先，移除图片顶部红色矩形框内的所有贴纸和条形码内容；其次，将左侧青色线条圈出的细小植物茎干片段移动到右侧青色方框所在的边缘位置；最后，请确保画面中所有的红色和青色辅助线、框选轮廓及箭头等标注都被清除，保持图片原始尺寸不变。

short_en: Swap the contents of the two green box selection areas at the top and remove the markers.
user_prompt_en: Based on the green boxes and double-headed arrow indicated in the image, swap the object in the top-left green box with the object in the top-right green box, and remove all green box lines and arrows after completion.
short_zh: 将顶部两个绿色框选区域的内容互换，并去除标记。
user_prompt_zh: 根据图中绿色方框和双向箭头的指示，将左上角绿色框内的物体与右上角绿色框内的物体交换位置，完成后移除所有的绿色框线和箭头。

short_en: Move the airplane marked with the blue line to the position indicated by the red arrow
user_prompt_en: Please move the airplane inside the blue circle to the place pointed by the red arrow, and do not keep these markings after completion
short_zh: 将蓝线标出的飞机移至红色箭头所指位置
user_prompt_zh: 请把蓝色圈出来的飞机移动到红色箭头指的地方，完成后不要保留这些标记

short_en: Swap the windows inside the red box and pink box, and remove the boxes
user_prompt_en: Please swap the windows inside the red box and the pink box, and then remove the box lines
short_zh: 交换红色框和粉色框内的窗户位置，并移除框线
user_prompt_zh: 请把红色框和粉色框里的窗户互换位置，然后把框线去掉

short_en: Add the butterfly from the red outline to the green circle area
user_prompt_en: Please add a butterfly similar to the one in the red outline into the area inside the green circle.
short_zh: 在绿色圈选区域添加红框内的蝴蝶
user_prompt_zh: 请参照红色轮廓里的蝴蝶，在绿色圈选的花朵区域添加一只同样的蝴蝶

short_en: Move the label in the bottom-left blue box to the top-left, and change the text in the bottom-right yellow box to "JESSICA".
user_prompt_en: Please edit according to the instructions: move the label content within the bottom-left blue box to the empty space at the top-left, and change the text "GALLIA" inside the bottom-right yellow box to "JESSICA", finally remove all annotation boxes and arrows.
short_zh: 将左下角蓝框处的标签移至左上角，并将右下角黄框处的文字改为“JESSICA”。
user_prompt_zh: 请按照指示进行编辑：将图片左下角蓝色框线范围内的标签内容移动到左上角的空白位置，同时将右下角黄色框内的文字“GALLIA”修改为“JESSICA”，最后移除所有的标注框线和箭头。

short_en: Move the barcode from the green box to the blue box, and remove the box lines.
user_prompt_en: Please refer to the original image, move the barcode from inside the green box to the left, placing it where the blue box is located. After completing this, do not retain the green or blue box lines.
short_zh: 将绿色框内的条码移至蓝色框内，并移除框线。
user_prompt_zh: 请参考原图，将绿色框内的条码向左移动，放置到蓝色框所在的位置，完成后不要保留绿色和蓝色的框线。

short_en: Swap the lotus flower in the large cyan box with the lotus pod in the small cyan circle.
user_prompt_en: Please swap the position of the large lotus flower inside the large cyan outline with the lotus pod inside the small cyan circle above.
short_zh: 交换青色框内荷花与青线圈内莲蓬的位置。
user_prompt_zh: 请把青色方框框住的大荷花和上方青色圆圈圈住的莲蓬交换一下位置。

short_en: Move the label within the bottom green circle to the top green circle area.
user_prompt_en: Please refer to the original image and the marked instruction image, combine with text instructions to perform the following operations in the corresponding boxed areas. Ensure that you operate on the unedited original image and do not retain the frame lines; move the label within the lower green frame to the upper green frame area. Do not change the image size, ensure it blends naturally with the scene environment.
short_zh: 将下方绿色圈选区域内的标签移至上方绿色圈选位置。
user_prompt_zh: 请参考原图和做好标记的指令图，结合文字指令，在对应框线的地方进行以下操作。保证在未编辑的原图中操作，不要保留框线；将下方绿色框线范围内的标签移至上方绿色框线范围内。图片大小不要改变，确保和画面环境自然融合。

short_en: Delete the structure inside the orange frame, and move the lamppost marked by the blue line to the green circle area
user_prompt_en: Please follow the annotations: remove the object in the orange frame, move the lamppost indicated by the blue line to the green circle area, and ensure no frames remain.
short_zh: 删除橙色框内结构，将蓝色线标灯柱移至绿色圈处
user_prompt_zh: 请按标注操作：删除橙色框中的物体，把蓝色线标出的灯柱移到绿色圈的位置，并确保没有保留任何框线

short_en: Swap the content positions between the yellow and red outlined areas
user_prompt_en: Please swap the position of the label content inside the yellow box with the insect specimen inside the red box, and remove the outline lines.
short_zh: 交换黄色框和红色框区域内的内容位置
user_prompt_zh: 请将图中黄色框内的标签内容与红色框内的昆虫标本位置对调，并去掉框线。

short_en: Remove the QR code in the red box, and swap the objects in the purple and blue boxes
user_prompt_en: Please remove the QR code inside the red box at the top right, and swap the positions of the stone circled in purple and the one circled in blue at the bottom
short_zh: 去掉红框处的二维码，交换紫色框和蓝色框内物体的位置
user_prompt_zh: 请去掉右上角红框里的二维码，然后把底下紫色圈出来的石头和蓝色圈出来的石头对调一下位置

short_en: Swap animals at green circle and blue line marked positions
user_prompt_en: Exchange the positions of the animal in the green circle with the one marked by the blue line, then remove all markings.
short_zh: 交换绿色圈与蓝色线标注位置的动物
user_prompt_zh: 把绿色圈里的动物和蓝色线画着的动物位置换一下，去掉那些标记的线

short_en: Move the white object from the top blue box to the bottom blue box position and rotate it 90 degrees; change the number in the bottom-left yellow box to 20708
user_prompt_en: Please move the white object inside the top blue box to the position of the bottom blue box in the center, and rotate it 90 degrees. At the same time, replace the number in the bottom-left yellow box with "20708".
short_zh: 将上方蓝框内的白色物体移至下方蓝框位置并旋转90度，将左下角黄框内的数字改为20708
user_prompt_zh: 请将上方蓝色框里的白色物体移动到中间下方的蓝色框位置，并将它旋转90度摆放。同时，把左下角黄色框里的数字替换成“20708”。
